name: Weather ADK Agent
description: ADK Agent providing current weather, forecasts, and A2UI native component outputs over the A2A protocol.

capabilities.name: get_current_weather
capabilities.description: Retrieves real-time weather metrics including temperature, humidity, wind, and AQI.

capabilities.name: get_weather_forecast
capabilities.description: Retrieves multi-day weather forecasts with daily highs, lows, and precipitation risks.
